## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Deployment:** (local Docker / dev server / production)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., console errors, network responses, relevant logs).
